name: Traptrix Mantis
name_jp: ランカの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>蟲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>惑</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>わく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Unaffected by the effects of "Hole" Normal Traps. When this card is Normal Summoned: You can add 1 "Traptrix" monster from your Deck to your hand. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can target 1 Set Spell/Trap you control; return that target to the hand, then you can Set 1 Spell/Trap from your hand.
mnst_eff: Unaffected by the effects of "Hole" Normal Traps. When this card is Normal Summoned: You can add 1 "Traptrix" monster from your Deck to your hand. Once per turn (Quick Effect): You can target 1 Set Spell/Trap you control; return that target to the hand, then you can Set 1 Spell/Trap from your hand.
eff: Unaffected by the effects of "Hole" Normal Traps. When this card is Normal Summoned: You can add 1 "Traptrix" monster from your Deck to your hand. action: Returns from your field to your hand
